summary: Complete testing of CuePartner AI script parser fix. Verified that the LlmChat import path fix is working correctly - AI parsing now succeeds instead of falling back to regex. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed PDF upload, Paste Script, character selection, and Reader/teleprompter functionality all working correctly with AI-powered analysis.

issues: ESLint warnings about missing useEffect dependencies - not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: AI parser import fix verified: Changed from 'emergentintegrations.llm.openai import LlmChat' to 'emergentintegrations.llm.chat import LlmChat'
Backend logs confirm 'AI parsing succeeded' messages when parsing scripts
Reader.jsx has ESLint warnings about missing useEffect dependencies but functionality works correctly
seed_data_creation: Test projects created during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI script parser fix verified working. The bug was incorrect import path for LlmChat in parse_script_with_ai_async function (server.py line 383). Import changed from 'emergentintegrations.llm.openai import LlmChat' to 'emergentintegrations.llm.chat import LlmChat'. Backend logs show 'AI parsing succeeded' messages. All PDF upload, Paste Script, character selection, and Reader teleprompter features work correctly.

ai_script_parsing_fix.details: AI parser using correct import path - logs show 'AI parsing succeeded: 3 lines, 2 characters' after PDF upload

pdf_upload.details: PDF upload detects characters and lines correctly using AI parser (not regex fallback)

paste_script.details: Paste script functionality with AI analysis - detects characters, emotions, voice descriptions

character_selection.details: Character selection works, marks user lines correctly, shows 'Selected' confirmation

reader_start_screen.details: Ready to Rehearse screen shows stats (Total Lines, Your Lines, Characters), character name

teleprompter_active.details: Active teleprompter shows script with character names, line counter (1/8), Stop button, user lines marked with (YOU)

ai_character_analysis.details: AI provides voice descriptions like 'grounded working-class male', 'steady detective voice with weary edge'

ai_emotion_analysis.details: Lines have emotion tags like 'fearful • medium', 'angry • medium', 'desperate • medium'

verified_fix.issue: AI script parser was failing due to wrong import path in emergentintegrations library
fix_details: Import changed from 'emergentintegrations.llm.openai import LlmChat' to 'emergentintegrations.llm.chat import LlmChat'
Backend logs now show 'AI parsing succeeded' instead of 'AI parsing failed, falling back to regex'
